BackstoryDef.title: Lawyer
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: After graduating law school, [PAWN_nameDef] fought vigilantly in the court of law, defending innocent and not-so-innocent clients alike. [PAWN_nameDef] was known for the famous line, "Innocent, or so help my tongue!" Unfortunately, the last client [PAWN_pronoun] had openly lied when they realized they were facing life in prison, claiming that [PAWN_nameDef] trained them to and bribed them to lie in court, causing [PAWN_possessive] law license to be frozen, pending investigation.
